title: Modern Vampirism
description: The mod allows you become a vampire
body:
# What is mod about?
Become a vampire and obtain special abilities and disadvantages.
* You can not consume common food anymore: You shell drink blood!
* You shell stay out of the sun: Sunlight will burn you!
* You are king of the night now: You can see in the dark.
* You must not breath anymore.

There are also optional abilities.
* Swiftness
* Mightiness
* Hipnosis
* Witchcraft

You can upgrade any two of them and obtain new skills.
Your abilities are depent on you __clan__

# How can I become a vampire?
You can find __Totems of Unliving__ in chests around the world.

Every totem is binded to the certain __clan__.

So, you should just die with the totem and you will become a vampire
